title: Trisetopsis mannii
taxonomy: Trisetopsis mannii is classified within the family Poaceae. This classification places it in the order Poales. Within the family Poaceae, it is further classified as a genus in the subfamily Pooideae. The subfamily Pooideae is a large and diverse group, containing many species of grasses. The classification of Trisetopsis mannii is subject to change as new research and evidence become available.
